news.t: High-Income Gold ETFs Signal Unease Beneath Market Surface
Kurv Launches KSLV: The First Silver ETF with Enhanced Income
Kurv Unveils KGLD: A New Way of Seeking Enhanced Income With Gold

overview.description: The Kurv Gold Enhanced Income ETF (KGLD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in gold commodities. The fund is actively managed, seeking to maximize total return through investments in gold, gold bullion-related EPS, derivatives, and fixed-income securities. The fund aims to outperform physical gold. KGLD was launched on Jul 8, 2025 and is issued by Kurv.
